title: Implement Wave 38 manager provider handoff fit contract
description: Extend manager provider-candidate discovery so handoff flows receive additive provider fit preview and recommendation metadata while preserving the current assignment mutation contract.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/properties/{id}/provider-candidates returns additive fit preview and recommendation metadata for each candidate
Assignment mutation responses remain backward compatible and do not require new fields to keep working
Existing handoff consumers continue to work when they ignore the new candidate nodes
